diagrams.title: Pointer Aliasing Concept
diagrams.description: Shows two different pointers (int* ptr1 and int* ptr2) pointing to the same memory location containing value 42
diagrams.purpose: Visualize basic aliasing where same memory accessed via multiple pointers

diagrams.title: Strict Aliasing Violation
diagrams.description: Shows an int* and float* both pointing to same memory - violates strict aliasing rule
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate what strict aliasing prohibits - accessing same memory as different types (except char*)

diagrams.title: Restrict Keyword Effect
diagrams.description: Shows how restrict creates exclusive access enabling compiler optimizations
elements: Register cache box showing cached value
Arrow showing no need to reload from memory
diagrams.purpose: Show how restrict enables compiler optimization by guaranteeing single access path

diagrams.title: Union Type Punning
diagrams.description: Shows a union with int and float members sharing same memory
diagrams.purpose: Visualize correct type punning technique using union in C99+

diagrams.title: Overlapping Memory in Memmove
diagrams.description: Shows source and destination memory regions that overlap and how memmove handles it
diagrams.purpose: Explain why memmove is needed for overlapping regions
